title: dortmanna erinus var. bellidifolia
intro: Dortmanna erinus var. bellidifolia, also known as Sweet Alyssum, is a flowering plant in the carrot family that has been naturalized in many parts of the world. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Sweet Alyssum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, calm nervous disorders, and act as a natural remedy for insomnia. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna erinus var. bellidifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be made by steeping the flowers in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol.
